hero.title: Local Tourism System of Costa Rica
hero.description: A platform designed to bring you the best of the Costa Rican Pacific: from the legendary waves of Santa Teresa, Tamarindo and Jacó, to the lush nature of Manuel Antonio and the turquoise waters of Playa Conchal. Discover beaches, restaurants, hotels, viewpoints and activities recommended by the local community, all organized by destination so you can plan your next adventure hassle-free.
hero.cta: Select one of the destinations below to start exploring 👇

santa-teresa.name: Santa Teresa Beach
santa-teresa.description: Perfect waves for surfing and spectacular sunsets on the Nicoya Peninsula.

tamarindo.name: Tamarindo Beach
tamarindo.description: Guanacaste's liveliest destination, famous for surfing and nightlife.

manuel-antonio.name: Manuel Antonio Beach
manuel-antonio.description: Lush nature right by the sea: monkeys, sloths and crystal-clear waters.

jaco.name: Jacó Beach
jaco.description: The most accessible beach from San José, perfect for surfing and adventure.

conchal.name: Conchal Beach
conchal.description: A unique beach formed by millions of shells, with calm turquoise waters.
